title: Mali’s junta asked Russians to bring order. Militants just stormed in.
summary_full: Al-Qaeda-linked fighters killed the defense minister, a top Moscow ally, and forced Russian mercenaries to retreat, highlighting the Mali-Russia partnership’s failure.
summary_public: Al-Qaeda-linked fighters killed the defense minister, a top Moscow ally, and forced Russian mercenaries to retreat, highlighting the Mali-Russia partnership’s failure.

RU.label: positive
RU.evidence: forced Russian mercenaries to retreat, highlighting the Mali-Russia partnership’s failure
